'''Stanz''' was the [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] of the cargo hauler [[Freebird (cargo hauler)|''Freebird'']] who offered to buy ore cheap from the colonists on [[New Brigia]]. [[Negus Nigekus]], a colonist believed him to be a pirate at heart because he gave them very little credits for their ore. The "[[Freebird (cargo hauler)|Freebird]]" was the only cargo hauler that came to New Brigia, so the colonists had no choice. It is unknown if he was on New Brigia when it was attacked by the [[Yevetha]] in [[16 ABY/Legends|16 ABY]].
